sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39708" key="e)pikhro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικηρόω</orth>, <sense id="n39708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wax over, rub with wax</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:2:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
